title: acianthus saxatilis
intro: Acianthus saxatilis, also known as the greenhood orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. It is native to eastern Australia and is known for its greenish-yellow flowers that resemble a hood. The medicinal properties of Acianthus saxatilis include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of the plant can be used to create teas and salves that may help to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation, but further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
